svg.title: Four-layer verification stack for AI in clinical trials
svg.desc: Vertical stack showing RBQM pre-verification, Gate 1 regulatory compliance, Gate 2 formal proof, and Gate 3 human oversight, with an immutable audit trail spanning all layers.
svg.text: Output: risk classification H / M / L per dimension
ICH E6(R3) aligned — pre-verification before any AI output
Deterministic — same input, same adapter version, same result
Attestation level assigned by sponsor / PI — not the system
Immutable audit trail — 21 CFR Part 11 — bi-temporal
